headline: Scotiabank Upgrades CF Industries Holdings to Sector Outperform, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Ben Isaacson   upgrades CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) from Sector Perform to Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $120 to $125.
